title: Named skillsets CLI
description: Implement the approved named skillsets CLI in five incremental beads, delivering the safe init/create/use core first. Source plan: docs/plans/2026-07-10-named-skillsets-cli-implementation.md

title: Bead 1: Safe core MVP - init, create, use
description: Deliver the first safe usable CLI slice: executable and black-box harness; name/path validation; advisory locking; init migration and rollback; empty and cloned create; atomic use; minimal README. All exposed commands must reject invalid layouts and preserve the design-spec invariants. Acceptance: observed RED/GREEN coverage for happy paths, refusal cases, contention, interrupted staging, and rollback failures; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0; bin/skillset --help lists only implemented commands. Source: plan Bead 1.

title: Bead 2: Managed upstream delegation
description: Add skillset skills passthrough with inherited terminal behavior, exact exit status, global flag injection, project-scope rejection, unknown-command warning, child-only XDG_STATE_HOME removal, invalid-layout refusal, and lifetime advisory locking. Acceptance: fake-npx argument, environment, signal, exit, and contention tests pass; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 2.

title: Bead 3: Inspection and everyday usability
description: Add lock-protected read-only list, current, verbose list, and show commands plus the focused dependency-free frontmatter parser and malformed-skill reporting. All commands reject uninitialized or invalid layouts. Acceptance: sorted and script-friendly output and all supported/malformed scalar cases are tested; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 3.

title: Bead 4: Remaining lifecycle operations
description: Add rename and remove with active-set safeguards, confirmation and --yes, collision refusal, containment, symlink safety, and recoverable and failed rollback reporting. Acceptance: lifecycle happy paths and all destructive refusal cases are black-box tested; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 4.

title: Bead 5: Diagnostics and hardening
description: Add lock-protected non-mutating doctor diagnostics, severity-aware exits, invalid/partial layout reporting, lock/content and metadata checks, recovery-message retrofit, complete regression coverage, and final README guidance. Acceptance: every design-spec section maps to passing behavior or documentation; python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v exits 0. Source: plan Bead 5.
